title: SZKOLENIE DLA PRODUCENTÓW DROBIU W ZAKRESIE PRZYGOTOWANIA NA FERMIE ZAPLECZA TECHNICZNEGO DLA WIZYTUJĄCEGO LEKARZA WETERYNARII
description: A training program for poultry producers on preparing dedicated technical facilities at the farm for visiting veterinarians. It details the setup of clinical diagnostics and necropsy rooms and procedures to speed up disease diagnosis and prevent cross-contamination between farm buildings.
